cacheWarmupResult.title: Cache warmup result
cacheWarmupResult.description: Lists all crawled URLs, grouped by their crawling result.

cancelled.title: Cache warmup cancellation state
cancelled.description: Indicates whether cache warmup was cancelled prematurely.

cacheWarmupStatistics.title: Cache warmup statistics
cacheWarmupStatistics.description: Measured time and memory usage used to run cache warmup

parserResult.title: Parser result
parserResult.description: Lists all parsed and excluded XML sitemaps and URLs, grouped by their parsing state.

success.title: Successfully parsed XML sitemaps and URLs
success.description: Only written if output is very verbose

parserStatistics.title: Parser statistics
parserStatistics.description: Measured time and memory usage used to parse XML sitemaps

additionalStatistics.title: Additional statistics
additionalStatistics.description: AddMeasured time and memory usage of additional actions (excluding parsing and crawling)

duration.title: Time (in milliseconds) used to perform a specific action

memoryPeak.title: Memory peak (in bytes) while performing a specifc action

memoryUsage.title: Memory (in bytes) used to perform a specifc action
